Chinese definition: 那頭，那邊（比較遠的距離）。例：哎頭碌有間觀音廟〔那邊有一間觀音廟〕。
English Definition: Over there; that side (relatively far). E.g. 'There's a Guanyin temple over there.'

Chinese definition: 字面是那麼容易死，但意思是“（哪有）那麼美好”。例：恁好死，今日請厓去食飯，梗係想尋厓幫忙啦〔那麼好，今天請我去食飯，一定想找我幫忙啦〕。
English Definition: Lit. 'so easy to die'. Ironic: 'That's too good to be true.' E.g. 'Treating me to dinner today? Must be wanting a favour.'

Chinese definition: 前世其實是“前世唔修”的縮略。字面意義是前世沒有修好，今生受苦，好慘。但一般引申為“那麼可憐，那麼差”。
English Definition: Short for 前世唔修 (didn't cultivate virtue in a past life). Means 'how pitiful / how terrible'.

Chinese definition: 鴨公是公鴨，叫聲沙啞。喻指聲音沙啞的人。
English Definition: A duck's hoarse voice. Describes a person with a hoarse or raspy voice.

Chinese definition: 人體或植物一半的位置，注意“中”的發音。
English Definition: Halfway up the body or a plant; mid-point. Note: 中 is pronounced with a different tone.

Chinese definition: 1) 說別人的話有口音，外語（或者其他方言）學得不好。2) 說某個地方的話不客不粵，很滑稽。
English Definition: Half-immersed in a river. 1) To speak with a strong accent; to speak a language/dialect poorly. 2) Speech that is neither Hakka nor Cantonese – amusing.

Chinese definition: 不男不女，人妖。一般指年輕人的穿着、舉止，帶有取笑的意思。
English Definition: Neither male nor female; androgynous or effeminate. Usually describes a young person's appearance or mannerisms, with a teasing tone.

Chinese definition: 一邊工作一遍讀書。
English Definition: Working and studying at the same time; work-study.

Chinese definition: 中途（放棄）。例：食飯食到半爛殘就講愛趕等開工〔吃飯吃到一半就說要趕着開工〕。
English Definition: Halfway through; in the middle of (and then stopping). E.g. 'Was halfway through eating when he said he had to rush off to work.'

Chinese definition: 一邊工作一邊遊玩。很輕鬆的工作，又作半做半料。例：其份工半做料，人工又高，㖠里都尋唔到〔他那份工作很輕鬆，薪水又高，哪裏都找不到〕。
English Definition: Working in a leisurely, relaxed way; half-working, half-playing. Also 半做半料. E.g. 'His job is so easy and pays well – you won't find that anywhere.'

Chinese definition: 本義是一種發餓的病，引申為貪心、貪小便宜。例：恁發餓癆，連一毫子都去撿？〔那麼貪小便宜，連一毛錢都去撿？〕
English Definition: Lit. 'hunger sickness'. Means greedy or taking advantage of freebies. E.g. 'So greedy you'd even pick up a single cent?'

Chinese definition: 字面是用畚箕來提着走。其實是指以前把女嬰殺害後處理屍體的動作。近代演變為罵女孩子的話，又作“畚箕笠”。
English Definition: Lit. 'carrying a dustpan'. Refers to an old practice of disposing of female infants. Now used as an insult for girls, or as 畚箕笠.

Chinese definition: 搬弄是非，亂說的意思。
English Definition: To gossip; to spread rumours; to stir up trouble with words.

Chinese definition: 嬰孩身上散發着奶的臊味。笑人心智未成熟，黄毛小子乳臭未干。例：你都還臭嬭臊就學人拍拖？〔你還有奶臊味就學着別人談戀愛？〕
English Definition: Smelling of milk (of an infant). Used to mock someone immature: 'still wet behind the ears'. E.g. 'You still smell of milk and you're already dating?'

Chinese definition: 字面是有貓屎的臭味。比喻為兩個小孩玩耍之間起爭執。例：兩老表搞冇兩下就臭貓屎〔兩老表玩沒兩下就翻臉〕。
English Definition: Smelling of cat dung. Describes quarrels or spats between children. E.g. 'The two cousins started fighting after just a short while.'

Chinese definition: 蔬果等食物給水泡太久而產生的難聞味道。
English Definition: The unpleasant smell of vegetables or fruit soaked in water for too long.

Chinese definition: 指吃飯吃很久的人（一般指小孩）。
English Definition: A person (usually a child) who takes a very long time to eat their meal.

Chinese definition: 坐冷板凳。受到冷落。
English Definition: To sit on a cold stone. Means to be left out in the cold; to be given the cold shoulder.

Chinese definition: 字面是出到盡頭了，其實是罵對方的父母生出一個不能再壞的人。但後來這句話的意義又變得溫和點，用來笑別人過分而已。例：你真係出絕嗨，恁樣都想得出來〔你真的太過分了，這樣都想得出來〕。
English Definition: Lit. 'born to the end of the line'. Originally a curse that the recipient's lineage will end. Now softened to 'you've gone too far'. E.g. 'You've really outdone yourself, how did you even think of that?'

Chinese definition: 字面是被拉去打靶的人，引申為該死的。但現代只是用來笑罵對方的暱稱。又作“炮打鬼”。
English Definition: Lit. 'person shot at the execution ground'. Means 'damned' or 'scoundrel'. Now often used as a playful nickname. Also 炮打鬼.

Chinese definition: 字面是打死他。但沒那麼嚴重，只是嚇唬小孩的話。
English Definition: Lit. 'beat him to death'. Used to threaten (or scare) children; not as serious as it sounds.

Chinese definition: （比較好的衣服）穿來幹粗活。
English Definition: To wear good or decent clothes for rough, dirty work.

Chinese definition: 本指人鬼神上身亂說話。用來罵人亂蓋。又作打病噏。
English Definition: Lit. 'possessed by a ghost, talking nonsense'. Used to scold someone for talking rubbish. Also 打病噏.

Chinese definition: 字面是管他。其實是由他去。
English Definition: Lit. 'manage/deal with him'. Actually means 'never mind him; let him be; ignore him'.

Chinese definition: 看扁他。例：佢恁懶，厓打落佢考唔倒大學/〔他那麼懶惰，我看死他考不上大學〕。
English Definition: To look down on him; to underestimate him. E.g. 'He's so lazy, I bet he can't get into university.'

Chinese definition: 本指病重的人亂說話。用來罵人亂說話。又作打鬼噏。
English Definition: Lit. 'talking deliriously when ill'. Used to scold someone for talking nonsense. Also 打鬼噏.

Chinese definition: 本來用來送飯或者送酒的食物，單獨拿來吃。
English Definition: To eat by itself something that was meant as a side dish or accompaniment.

Chinese definition: 在野外覓食，也引申為在外面偷情。
English Definition: To forage in the wild. Extended: to have an affair or go behind a partner's back.

Chinese definition: 照顧小孩，又作渡人仔。
English Definition: To take care of a child. Also 渡人仔.

Chinese definition: 刀石，磨刀石。從前到後很長，像個磨刀石的頭型。
English Definition: A whetstone (for sharpening knives). Also refers to a head shaped like a long whetstone.

Chinese definition: 才那麼的一丁點。
English Definition: Just that tiny little bit; only so much (dismissively).

Chinese definition: 小部分小部分地。例：打爛隻杯，玻璃析愛滴打滴撿起來〔到了杯子，玻璃碎片要一塊一塊撿起來〕。
English Definition: Little by little; piece by piece. E.g. 'The glass shards need to be picked up one by one.'

Chinese definition: 一丁點兒。又作滴息仔、滴仔。
English Definition: A tiny little bit; a very small amount. Also 滴息仔, 滴仔.

Chinese definition: 一丁點兒。又作滴哥仔、滴仔。
English Definition: A tiny little bit; a very small amount. Also 滴哥仔, 滴仔.

Chinese definition: 一雙雙一對對的。
English Definition: In pairs; one pair at a time.

Chinese definition: 本義是指一些生病，沒有胃口，躲在一旁的雞。“掩膆”是指前胃沒有時食物凹下去的狀態。引申義指人生病、沒有精神的樣子。
English Definition: A sick chicken that has lost its appetite and huddles to the side. 掩膆 = the sunken crop of a listless chicken. Extended: a person who looks ill or listless.

Chinese definition: 指屍體在棺材中腐爛。罵人家去死的話。
English Definition: A body rotting in a coffin. A harsh curse: 'Go rot in your coffin.'

Chinese definition: 罵人屍體在泥土中腐爛。連泥土都弄爛了。罵人家去死的話。又作漚黃泥。
English Definition: A body rotting in the soil, contaminating it. A harsh curse. Also 漚黃泥.

Chinese definition: 指屍體在黃土中腐爛。罵人家去死的話。又作漚歿泥。
English Definition: A body rotting in yellow earth. A harsh curse. Also 漚歿泥.

Chinese definition: 口頭禪，相當於：呸，大吉利是。
English Definition: An exclamation: 'Ptooey! Good grief!' A mild dismissive exclamation.

Chinese definition: 睡覺沒一會便醒來。
English Definition: A dog-flea nap; to fall asleep briefly and wake up again almost immediately; a very light, short sleep.

Chinese definition: （被他欺負）因為他而哭。注意“對”的發音。
English Definition: To cry because of him; (being bullied) crying on his account. Note: 對 has a specific tone.

Chinese definition: 哭着要喝奶。但也用來來嘲笑人思想幼稚，沒長大。
English Definition: Crying for milk. Also used mockingly: thinking like a child; immature.

Chinese definition: 詈語，罵人絕子絕孫，又作過魔。
English Definition: A curse meaning 'may your lineage end'. Also 過魔.

Chinese definition: （在於）每個人。例：榴蓮好唔好食，各在人唔同〔榴蓮好食與否，因人而異〕。
English Definition: It varies by person; it depends on the individual. E.g. 'Whether durian tastes good or not varies from person to person.'

Chinese definition: 指一個人發育不良，很瘦小的身材。
English Definition: Lit. 'ghost tendons'. Describes a person with a poorly developed, very thin, scrawny build.

Chinese definition: 非常鹹，鹹到發苦。
English Definition: So salty it turns bitter; extremely salty.

Chinese definition: 暫時這樣。相當於“再見”。
English Definition: OK for now; bye for now. Equivalent to 'see you later'.

Chinese definition: 有口福。
English Definition: Having the fortune to enjoy good food; a blessed palate.

Chinese definition: （指小孩）很有口頭上的禮貌。
English Definition: Describes a child who is polite and well-spoken.

Chinese definition: 有好處給人。例：帶恁多東西來，有乜介好總成厓哦〔帶那麼多東西來，有什麼好處給我的〕。
English Definition: Something beneficial to offer someone. E.g. 'Bringing all these things – there must be something in it for me?'

Chinese definition: 字面是背著竹筒，意思是行乞的人。
English Definition: Lit. 'carrying a bamboo tube (as a beggar)'. Means a beggar.

Chinese definition: 小心點。
English Definition: Watch out; be careful.

Chinese definition: 看清楚下。
English Definition: Take a proper look; look carefully.

Chinese definition: 空腹。例：空心肚唔食得酒〔空腹不能喝酒〕。
English Definition: An empty stomach; fasting. E.g. 'Don't drink alcohol on an empty stomach.'

Chinese definition: 字面是斷掉尾巴的龍。但其中有個複雜的典故。現在引申為“搞風搞雨”，添麻煩的人。
English Definition: Lit. 'a dragon with a broken tail'. Complex legend. Now means someone who stirs up trouble and creates mischief for others.

Chinese definition: 煮得很爛，幾乎好像粥一樣的飯。
English Definition: Rice cooked so soft it is almost like congee.

Chinese definition: 字面是爛掉的男性器官。蔑稱流氓、地痞。
English Definition: Lit. 'rotten male genitals'. A derogatory term for a ruffian or hoodlum.

Chinese definition: 搖頭擺鬧，走路不穩的樣子。
English Definition: Walking with a swaying, wobbly, unstable gait; wobbling from side to side.

Chinese definition: 仰邊（老派發音為ngiòng bién），怎樣。仰邊好：怎樣是好，怎麼辦？
English Definition: What should be done? What is the best approach? How should we handle this? (仰邊 = how; 老派 ngiòng bién)

Chinese definition: “仰”是“仰邊”的簡稱，意思是“怎樣有那麼快？”
English Definition: How could it be that fast? 'How did you get here so quickly?' (shortened form of 仰邊)

Chinese definition: 不合胃口想吐。例子：厓正先食到嘅酸梅唔着意〔我剛才吃到的酸梅不合胃口〕。
English Definition: Unpalatable; makes you want to spit it out. Not to one's taste. E.g. 'The sour plum I just ate was not to my taste at all.'

Chinese definition: 不合穿。注意“着”是多音多義字。
English Definition: Doesn't fit (clothing). Note: 着 is polysemous.

Chinese definition: “伸差”是整齊。但“唔伸差”除了指物件不整齊以外，還有事情不清楚、沒條理的意思。例：這件事厓都講唔伸差咯〔這件事我也無法講清楚了〕。
English Definition: Untidy; unclear; in a mess. Also: unable to explain clearly. E.g. 'I can't even explain this matter clearly.'

Chinese definition: 巴不得。例：其三兄弟唔得倒其爸一死就分身家〔他們三兄弟巴不得他們爸爸一死就分家產〕。
English Definition: Would like nothing better than; wishing for. E.g. 'His three brothers wish their father would die so they can divide the estate.'

Chinese definition: 時間還沒到。例：惹賴子幾時娶老婆噢？唔得來嗻（zé）〔你兒子什麼時候結婚啦？還早着啦〕。
English Definition: The time hasn't come yet; too early for that. E.g. 'When is your son getting married? It'll be a while yet.'

Chinese definition: 字面是想死，找死。但比喻為白費氣力、白幹。明知佢唔識字還送本書分佢，唔得死咩〔明知道他不識字還送一本書給他，白費氣力〕。
English Definition: Lit. 'court death' – means doing something pointless or futile. E.g. 'Giving an illiterate person a book – what a waste of effort.'

Chinese definition: 不怕死，引申為不知天高地厚，又指不知內情。例：厓大吾老弟十八年，唔知死好多人還以為我係其爸〔我比弟弟大十八年，不知就裏的很多人還以為我是他爸爸〕。
English Definition: Not afraid to die; doesn't know one's limits; unaware of the situation. E.g. 'I'm 18 years older than my brother – people who don't know would think I'm his father.'

Chinese definition: （通常指小孩、貓狗）不懂事。有時跟“唔知死”差不多。又作“唔知天、唔知天性”。
English Definition: Doesn't know better (usually of children or animals); misbehaving. Also 唔知天, 唔知天性.

Chinese definition: 不知羞恥，不要臉。
English Definition: Shameless; has no sense of shame.

Chinese definition: 不經意，不小心。
English Definition: Unaware; inattentive; not noticing.

Chinese definition: （通常指小孩、貓狗）不懂事。有時跟“唔知死”差不多。又作“唔知天、唔知天性”。
English Definition: Doesn't know better (usually of children or animals). Also 唔知性, 唔知天性.

Chinese definition: 不理睬你。
English Definition: Not paying any attention to you; ignoring you.

Chinese definition: （食物太少）不夠喉。
English Definition: (Of food) not enough to satisfy the throat; not enough.

Chinese definition: 飯未熟透，中心仍然很硬，好像有個核一樣。
English Definition: Rice not cooked through – still hard in the centre, like it has a stone core.

Chinese definition: 慢着，等一下。
English Definition: Wait a moment; hold on.

Chinese definition: 字面是“不是路”，但意思是不對勁，不像話。
English Definition: Lit. 'not the road'. Means: something is off; this isn't right; this is not acceptable.

Chinese definition: 捨不得。
English Definition: Can't bear to part with; reluctant to give up.

Chinese definition: 字面是不用來。但語氣不一樣有兩個意思。語氣輕的話是字面意義。語氣重的話是“（你）少來（這套）吧”。
English Definition: Don't need to come (literal, light tone); or 'Don't give me that!' (dismissive, heavy tone).

Chinese definition: 語氣不一樣有兩個意思：1) 不能工作。2) 不行。例：你唔做得打人〔你不能打人〕。3) 病重到快要死得委婉語。例：佢病到恁嚴重，怕快唔做得了〔他病到那麼嚴重，恐怕快不行了〕。
English Definition: 1) Cannot work. 2) Not OK; not acceptable. 3) Euphemism for terminally ill. E.g. 'You're not allowed to hit people.' / 'He's so seriously ill, I'm afraid he won't make it.'

Chinese definition: 隨便來，亂來。
English Definition: To do things randomly and carelessly.

Chinese definition: 本是一個穿着麻衣的煞星。現一般用來罵人。有時也用作暱稱。
English Definition: A malevolent spirit wearing mourning clothes (hemp garments). Used as a curse or sometimes affectionately as a nickname.

Chinese definition: 刮煞是辦法。沒法子的意思。
English Definition: 刮煞 = a method/way. 冇刮煞 = there's no way; nothing can be done.

Chinese definition: 沒有教養。
English Definition: Without manners; badly brought up; no upbringing.

Chinese definition: 下頷，下巴。傳說中的鬼是沒有下巴的，因此“冇下頷”一般指人說鬼話，胡扯。
English Definition: Lit. 'no lower jaw' (ghosts are said to lack a lower jaw). Means: talking nonsense; talking rubbish.

Chinese definition: 沒心情。又作“冇心冇性”。
English Definition: Not in the mood; lacking motivation or interest. Also 冇心冇性.

Chinese definition: 沒記性。
English Definition: Forgetful; poor memory.

Chinese definition: 母貓經常搬動自己的孩子到新的地方。因此貓徙竇用來比喻一些經常搬家的人。
English Definition: A mother cat that frequently moves her kittens to a new location. Describes a person who moves house very often.

Chinese definition: “暮固”是不作聲的意思。“暮固狗”是指一些不喜歡吠的狗，但也要來戲稱不太說話的人。
English Definition: 暮固 = quiet, not barking. A quiet dog that doesn't bark. Describes a quiet, reserved person.

Chinese definition: “目睡”是睏的意思。“目睡鳥”是戲稱一些經常感到睏的人。
English Definition: 目睡 = drowsy. A drowsy bird. Teasing nickname for someone who is always sleepy or dozing off.

Chinese definition: 指小孩頑皮。“牛王”是牛魔王的意思。
English Definition: A mischievous, naughty child. 牛王 = Ox King / Bull Demon King.

Chinese definition: 隨你的便。
English Definition: Up to you; do as you like; suit yourself.

Chinese definition: 本義是很兇猛的母雞。比喻為很兇惡的女人。
English Definition: A fierce, aggressive mother hen. Extended: a fierce, aggressive woman.

Chinese definition: 字面是被白蟻咬的人，其實是罵人家老不死。
English Definition: Lit. 'gnawed by termites'. A sarcastic insult implying the person is so old they should have been eaten by termites – 'you old thing, why won't you die?'

Chinese definition: 閉上眼睛的意思。也是“死去”的委婉語。
English Definition: To close one's eyes. Also a euphemism for dying.

Chinese definition: 很會捉老鼠的貓。也比喻很會管理下屬的老闆。
English Definition: A cat that is very good at catching mice. Extended: a boss who is very good at managing subordinates.

Chinese definition: （被他欺負）因為他而死，注意“對”的發音。
English Definition: To die because of him; (being bullied by him) suffering to the point of death. Note: 對 has a specific tone.

Chinese definition: 肭仔是小胖子。罵男孩的話。
English Definition: 肭仔 = little fatty. A scolding term for a plump boy.

Chinese definition: 罵女孩的話。
English Definition: A scolding term for a girl (妹罌 = girl's pot/jar).

Chinese definition: 罵人饞嘴，好吃。
English Definition: A scolding: 'you gluttonous pig'; greedy for food.

Chinese definition: 死會就是很會，很會算，但有負面的評價。
English Definition: Lit. 'dies knowing how to calculate'. Very calculating in a negative way; shrewd in a petty, self-serving manner.

Chinese definition: 四方的棍子。指一些不會變通的人。
English Definition: A four-sided rod. Describes a person who is rigid and inflexible, unable to adapt.

Chinese definition: 字面是裝鮮魚的盤子，但實指男嬰。客家人認為生男孩子比較值錢，好像鮮魚一樣。女孩比較不值錢，好像豬肉，所以問人家新出生孩子的性別，就用鮮魚缽來指稱男孩，豬肉缽來代表指稱女孩。
English Definition: Lit. 'fresh fish basin'. Refers to a newborn boy. Hakka traditionally valued sons more than daughters. A girl would be referred to as 豬肉缽 (pork basin). See also 豬肉缽.

Chinese definition: 在屁股後面。即正後方。“虱”是“屎窟”（屁股）的合音。注意“後”唸陰平調。
English Definition: Directly behind; right at the back. 虱 is a contraction of 屎窟 (buttocks). Note: 後 is read in level tone.

Chinese definition: 大吃一頓。但多數用來罵人。例：好去食飽餐咯〔去大吃一頓吧〕（表示有點不滿）。
English Definition: To have a big meal; eat one's fill. Often used sarcastically to show dissatisfaction: 'Go eat your fill then' (implies 'you've done something annoying').

Chinese definition: （天天重複的食物）食到怕，一點胃口都沒有。
English Definition: To be so sick of eating the same food that you've lost all appetite for it.

Chinese definition: “浪”是枉、浪費的意思。“食浪米”是罵人白白浪費米飯的意思，也是個不雅的詈語。
English Definition: 浪 = wasteful. Eating rice wastefully; also used as a vulgar insult.

Chinese definition: “啜”是嘴巴，吃到嘴巴都熱了，意思是吃上癮了。
English Definition: 啜 = mouth. Eating so much that the mouth is hot from it; eating compulsively; addicted to eating.

Chinese definition: 吃飯、睡覺、拉屎。嬰孩或者老人的生活，或者嘲笑人好像廢人一樣。
English Definition: Eating, sleeping, and defecating. The life of a baby or an elderly person; or mockingly: describing someone who does nothing productive.

Chinese definition: 字面是酸的果子，但引申為傻瓜、三八。
English Definition: Lit. 'sour fruit head'. Means a foolish, silly, or scatterbrained person.

Chinese definition: 把碎紙等東西灑在地上，弄得滿地垃圾的意思。
English Definition: To scatter paper scraps and other bits on the ground; to litter.

Chinese definition: 該死的，又可以說成“打靶鬼”。
English Definition: A damned scoundrel; also used as a playful nickname. Also 打靶鬼.

Chinese definition: 應該是病到脫頭髮的意思，本來是個罵人的詈語。現在用來互相笑罵的暱稱。
English Definition: Lit. 'sick enough to lose one's hair'. Originally a curse. Now used as a playful nickname between friends.

Chinese definition: 比喻一些塊頭大，但笨頭笨腦的人。
English Definition: A big sweet potato. Describes a large but dim-witted person.

Chinese definition: 照顧小孩，又作帶人仔。
English Definition: To take care of a child. Also 帶人仔.

Chinese definition: “灶下”是廚房的意思。歇後語是“出到門背唔曉啼”，指沒有膽量到外面去闖的人。
English Definition: 灶下 = kitchen. A kitchen chicken. The 歇後語 continuation is 出到門背唔曉啼 (can't crow once out the door) = someone too timid to venture out into the world.

Chinese definition: 字面是用嘴巴來說，指只說不幹。
English Definition: Lit. 'use the mouth to say'. Means talking without doing; all talk and no action.

Chinese definition: 用力。
English Definition: To exert force; to use strength.

Chinese definition: 豬篼是用來餵豬的容器，通常是長條形。豬進食的時候很急，濺出很多飼料，所以豬篼下面很髒。用來形容小孩吃飯浪費了一大半的樣子。
English Definition: 豬篼 = the feeding trough for pigs. Pigs eat frantically and slop food everywhere. Describes a child who makes a terrible mess while eating.

Chinese definition: （尤其指小孩）很多很大的一泡尿。
English Definition: (Especially of children) a very large amount of urine in one go.

Chinese definition: 字面是裝豬肉的盤子。但實指女嬰。見鮮魚缽一條。
English Definition: Lit. 'pork basin'. Refers to a newborn girl. Traditionally girls were considered less valuable. See 鮮魚缽.

Chinese definition: 餵豬的時候豬來接着勺子的食物，但通常只是接到一半左右。指一個人接受信息的時候沒有聽清楚，漏掉了很多重要的部分卻隨便插嘴。
English Definition: A pig rushing to grab food from a ladle, catching only half. Describes someone who only catches part of what is said and then blurts out an answer before hearing everything.

Chinese definition: 跳崖的意思，用來罵人。
English Definition: To jump off a cliff; used as a curse.

Chinese definition: 亂蹦亂跳，橫衝直撞最後而死的鬼，用來罵人亂跑。
English Definition: A ghost that runs around wildly and dies from crashing into things. Used to scold someone for running around recklessly.

Chinese definition: 跳到亂石堆而死的意思，用來罵人。
English Definition: To crash into a pile of rocks and die; used as a curse.

Chinese definition: 非常矮。
English Definition: Extremely short (in stature).

Chinese definition: （天色、地方）非常黑暗。
English Definition: Pitch dark (of a place or sky).

Chinese definition: 非常飽。
English Definition: Extremely full (after eating).

Chinese definition: 非常扁。
English Definition: Extremely flat.

Chinese definition: （容器）非常淺。
English Definition: Extremely shallow (of a container).

Chinese definition: （容器或者房子的深度）非常深。
English Definition: Extremely deep (of a container or room).

Chinese definition: （環境）非常靜。
English Definition: Extremely quiet (of a place).

Chinese definition: 非常直。
English Definition: Perfectly straight.

Chinese definition: 非常長。
English Definition: Extremely long.

Chinese definition: 非常粗。
English Definition: Extremely thick/coarse.

Chinese definition: 非常重。
English Definition: Extremely heavy.

Chinese definition: 非常短。
English Definition: Extremely short (in length).

Chinese definition: （衣物）非常寛。
English Definition: (Of clothing) extremely wide; very loose-fitting.

Chinese definition: （食物、水果）非常苦。
English Definition: (Of food or fruit) extremely bitter.

Chinese definition: 非常紅。（不好看的樣子）
English Definition: Extremely red (unattractive shade).

Chinese definition: 非常紅。（中性評價）
English Definition: Extremely red (neutral connotation).

Chinese definition: 非常紅。（中性評價）
English Definition: Extremely red (neutral).

Chinese definition: （尤其指身材）非常高，又作高天天。
English Definition: Extremely tall (especially of a person). Also 高天天.

Chinese definition: 非常光亮。
English Definition: Extremely bright and shiny.

Chinese definition: 好端端。
English Definition: Perfectly fine; in good shape.

Chinese definition: 非常香。又作香噴噴。
English Definition: Extremely fragrant. Also 香噴噴.

Chinese definition: 非常香。又作香不不。
English Definition: Extremely fragrant. Also 香不不.

Chinese definition: 非常輕。
English Definition: Extremely light (in weight).

Chinese definition: 指地方非常狹小。
English Definition: Extremely narrow (of a space).

Chinese definition: （衣物）非常舊。
English Definition: (Of clothing) extremely old and worn.

Chinese definition: 爛起來有水分，尤其是腐爛的物件或路上的泥濘。
English Definition: Rotting with moisture; waterlogged (rotten objects or muddy roads).

Chinese definition: 爛起來幾乎溶化了。又作爛溶溶。
English Definition: Almost completely disintegrated; so rotten it's nearly dissolved. Also 爛溶溶.

Chinese definition: 爛起來幾乎溶化了。又作爛綿棉。
English Definition: Almost completely dissolved/disintegrated. Also 爛綿棉.

Chinese definition: （天氣）非常冷。
English Definition: (Of weather) extremely cold.

Chinese definition: （食物放太久）非常冷。
English Definition: (Of food left too long) stone cold.

Chinese definition: （食物尤其是蔬菜）非常老（“老嚙嚙”不能用來形容人）。
English Definition: (Of vegetables) extremely tough and fibrous (cannot be used for people).

Chinese definition: （食物或用品）非常軟而引起不舒服的感覺
English Definition: (Of food or objects) unpleasantly soft and slimy.

Chinese definition: （食物或用品，也可以指人）非常軟（負面評價）。
English Definition: Extremely soft (negative connotation) – of food or objects, or even a person.

Chinese definition: （食物或者用品）非常軟（正面評價）。
English Definition: Extremely soft (positive connotation) – of food or objects.

Chinese definition: （食物或者用品）非常軟。
English Definition: Extremely soft – of food or objects.

Chinese definition: 人或者家畜非常胖（有點可愛）。
English Definition: Very chubby (endearingly) – of a person or animal.

Chinese definition: （稀飯等）很粘稠。
English Definition: (Of porridge etc.) very thick and viscous.

Chinese definition: 非常油膩。
English Definition: Extremely greasy or oily.

Chinese definition: （應該積水的地方或充滿水分的食物）很乾。
English Definition: Surprisingly dry (of a place that should hold water, or of food that should be moist).

Chinese definition: （地方）非常涼快而令人舒服。
English Definition: Pleasantly cool (of a place); a refreshing coolness.

Chinese definition: （地方）非常溫暖而令人舒服。
English Definition: Pleasantly warm and cozy (of a place).

Chinese definition: 非常凌亂。.
English Definition: Extremely messy and cluttered.

Chinese definition: （通常指蔬菜等食物）非常嫩而好吃。
English Definition: (Of vegetables etc.) extremely tender and tasty.

Chinese definition: 非常滿。
English Definition: Completely full; filled to the brim.

Chinese definition: （物體，尤其是麪包、饅頭等食物）非常硬。
English Definition: Extremely hard (of bread, buns etc.).

Chinese definition: （屍體）僵硬。或者是物品硬得讓不舒服。
English Definition: Stiffly rigid (of a corpse); or unpleasantly stiff/hard.

Chinese definition: （皮球、肚皮等）凹進去非常厲害。
English Definition: Severely sunken (of a ball or belly).

Chinese definition: （棉被、暖氣）熱而令人舒服。
English Definition: Pleasantly warm (of a blanket or heater).

Chinese definition: （物件）非常燙。
English Definition: Burning hot (of an object).

Chinese definition: （身體）非常軟而無力。
English Definition: Extremely limp and powerless (of a body).

Chinese definition: （物件）很柔軟。
English Definition: Very supple and soft (of an object).

Chinese definition: （食物如牛腩）非常韌，很難嚼。
English Definition: Extremely tough and chewy (of food like beef brisket).

Chinese definition: （人或者家畜）非常兇。
English Definition: Extremely fierce and aggressive (of a person or animal).

Chinese definition: 一鼻子灰的樣子，見“鼻公白糠糠”。
English Definition: Ashy pale (covered in dust); see 鼻公白糠糠.

Chinese definition: （臉色、墻壁）非常蒼白而不好看。
English Definition: Sickly white/pale (of a face or wall); unhealthily pale.

Chinese definition: 非常白（白得好看）。
English Definition: Brilliantly white (attractively white).

Chinese definition: 空心或非常不結實。
English Definition: Hollow or very flimsy and insubstantial.

Chinese definition: （鼻子等）很平，沒有凹凸感。通常是貶義。
English Definition: Very flat with no protrusions (usually of a nose); pejorative.

Chinese definition: 非常薄。
English Definition: Extremely thin.

Chinese definition: （人或者家畜）非常肥胖。
English Definition: Very fat and plump (of a person or animal).

Chinese definition: 非常厚。
English Definition: Extremely thick.

Chinese definition: （物件或者人體發燒）非常熱。
English Definition: Very hot (of an object or a fevered body).

Chinese definition: （物件）非常熱（可以燙到人）。
English Definition: Scalding hot (of an object; hot enough to burn).

Chinese definition: （物體表面）非常澀，不平滑。
English Definition: Very rough and uneven (of a surface); very astringent.

Chinese definition: （人或者家畜）非常瘦。
English Definition: Extremely thin and scrawny (of a person or animal).

Chinese definition: （魚）非常腥。
English Definition: Extremely fishy-smelling (of fish).

Chinese definition: 非常新，又作“橫新”。
English Definition: Brand new. Also 橫新.

Chinese definition: 水分多到流出來。
English Definition: Soaking wet; water dripping off.

Chinese definition: 很堅實。
English Definition: Very solid and firm.

Chinese definition: 感到很羞恥。
English Definition: Feeling very ashamed or embarrassed.

Chinese definition: （食物、水果）非常酸。
English Definition: (Of food or fruit) extremely sour.

Chinese definition: 非常甜（正面評價）。
English Definition: Very sweet (positive connotation).

Chinese definition: 非常甜（負面評價）。
English Definition: Very sweet (negative connotation; cloyingly sweet).

Chinese definition: （食物）沒有味道。
English Definition: (Of food) completely tasteless.

Chinese definition: 上面有粘液而非常滑（令人不快）。
English Definition: Slimy and slippery (unpleasantly slippery due to mucus).

Chinese definition: （物件、皮膚）非常滑，又作滑律律。
English Definition: Very smooth and slippery (of an object or skin). Also 滑律律.

Chinese definition: （物件、皮膚）非常滑，又作滑突突。
English Definition: Very smooth and slippery. Also 滑突突.

Chinese definition: 非常滑而光亮。
English Definition: Smooth and shiny; sleek.

Chinese definition: （食品等）非常柔軟，像豆腐腦一樣的質地。
English Definition: Extremely soft, like tofu jelly in texture (of food).

Chinese definition: （皮膚、臉色不健康）非常黃。
English Definition: (Of skin or complexion) unhealthily yellow.

Chinese definition: （物件）非常黃。
English Definition: (Of an object) very yellow.

Chinese definition: 形容膚色非常黑而健康。
English Definition: A very dark, healthy-looking skin tone.

Chinese definition: （物件）非常黑（沒有正面或者負面評價）。
English Definition: (Of an object) very black (neutral).

Chinese definition: （物件）非常黑（負面評價）。
English Definition: (Of an object) very black (negative connotation).

Chinese definition: （物件）非常黑（正面評價）。
English Definition: (Of an object) very black (positive connotation).

Chinese definition: （食品等）非常軟。
English Definition: (Of food) very soft and tender.

Chinese definition: 非常圓（好看），又作圓啲啲。
English Definition: Very round (attractively round). Also 圓啲啲.

Chinese definition: 非常圓（好看），又作圓丁丁。
English Definition: Very round (attractively round). Also 圓丁丁.

Chinese definition: 圓鼓鼓（負面）。
English Definition: Rounded and puffy (negative – of a face).

Chinese definition: 圓鼓鼓（中性或者負面）。
English Definition: Round and bulging (neutral or negative).

Chinese definition: （棍子等）很細，不中用。
English Definition: (Of a stick etc.) extremely thin and weak; flimsy.

Chinese definition: （食物）水分很少。
English Definition: (Of food) very dry and lacking moisture.

Chinese definition: 漲起來很飽滿。 另外，客家話有些熟語是身體部位A加上形容詞或動詞性B組成的ABB形式，造成修飾詞放在後面。這些結構部分與普通話和其他方言相同，可以互相借用，而且能產性很高，下面是常見的詞語：
English Definition: Plumply inflated; full and round.

Chinese definition: 肚子隆起，吃飽、懷孕或者肥胖的樣子。
English Definition: Belly bulging – from being full, pregnant, or obese.

Chinese definition: 肚子痛得很厲害。
English Definition: Stomach hurting very badly; sharp stomach pains.

Chinese definition: 腳很長。
English Definition: Very long legs.

Chinese definition: （一般指家禽或昆蟲死後）腳伸出來。
English Definition: (Of poultry or insects after death) legs spread out stiffly.

Chinese definition: 頭髮或者身上的毛很長的樣子。
English Definition: Very long hair or fur.

Chinese definition: 身上很多毛的樣子。
English Definition: Very fluffy; covered in fur or fine hair.

Chinese definition: 臉型很大（不好看）。
English Definition: Having a very large face (unattractive).

Chinese definition: 給臉色別人看。
English Definition: Giving someone a dirty look; wearing an unfriendly expression.

Chinese definition: 很面熟。
English Definition: Very familiar-looking; feels like you've seen them before.

Chinese definition: 尾巴豎起來。
English Definition: Tail raised and erect.

Chinese definition: 尾巴墜下去。
English Definition: Tail drooping downward.

Chinese definition: 齙牙的樣子。
English Definition: Teeth sticking out; buck-toothed appearance.

Chinese definition: （狗或兇猛動物）露出牙齒很兇的樣子。
English Definition: (Of a dog or fierce animal) teeth bared in an aggressive snarl.

Chinese definition: 笑容很好，經常露出牙齒。
English Definition: Always smiling broadly, often showing teeth; having a pleasant, toothy smile.

Chinese definition: 眼睛長得很深。
English Definition: Very deep-set eyes.

Chinese definition: 眼睛看不清楚。
English Definition: Eyes unable to see clearly; blurry vision.

Chinese definition: 用不禮貌的目光看人。“反”聲調為陽平。
English Definition: Giving someone a rude upward glance. (反 = level rising tone)

Chinese definition: 目不轉睛地盯着。
English Definition: Staring fixedly without blinking; eyes wide and focused.

Chinese definition: 眼睛翻白，失望的樣子。
English Definition: Eyes rolled back; a look of disappointment or exasperation.

Chinese definition: 眼睛盯着一個方向，目不轉睛。
English Definition: Eyes fixed in one direction; staring blankly.

Chinese definition: 耳朵豎起來的樣子，指很留心聽。
English Definition: Ears pricked up; listening very attentively.

Chinese definition: 很豐滿，滿身是肉。
English Definition: Very plump; full of flesh; well-padded.

Chinese definition: 鼻子很扁的樣子。
English Definition: A very flat nose.

Chinese definition: 一時控制不了出了手。
English Definition: Unable to keep one's hands to oneself; impulsively reaching out.

Chinese definition: 頭痛得很厲害。
English Definition: Severe headache; head throbbing with pain.

Chinese definition: 垂頭喪氣。又作頭犁犁。
English Definition: Hanging one's head dejectedly; crestfallen. Also 頭犁犁.

Chinese definition: 有點頭暈的感覺。
English Definition: Feeling heavy-headed; slightly dizzy.

Chinese definition: 垂頭喪氣。又作頭親親。
English Definition: Hanging one's head dejectedly. Also 頭親親.

Chinese definition: 雞鴨等禽鳥生病導致雙腿沒力氣，於是伸開翅膀來支撐身體，造成翅膀散開的樣子。 少量是動詞加補語的形式：
English Definition: Wings spread open and drooping (of a sick bird). Describes the posture of a diseased chicken using its wings as supports.

Chinese definition: 站着不動。
English Definition: Standing perfectly still; rooted to the spot.

Chinese definition: 活生生。
English Definition: Alive and kicking; living and breathing.

Chinese definition: 一點都不靈活。
English Definition: Completely lifeless and rigid; not at all lively or flexible.

Chinese definition: 趴着來睡覺的姿勢。
English Definition: Sleeping face-down; lying prone.

Chinese definition: 掙扎得很激烈。
English Definition: Struggling frantically; writhing vigorously.

Chinese definition: 頻繁地跌到（一般指小孩或老人）。
English Definition: Falling over repeatedly (usually of a small child or elderly person).

Chinese definition: 一塊一塊地掉下來。
English Definition: Falling off in chunks; crumbling away piece by piece.

Chinese definition: 站着不動。
English Definition: Standing stock-still; motionless.

Chinese definition: 四週（圍一個圈）。
English Definition: Going around in a circle; all around (in a ring).

Chinese definition: 繞圈。
English Definition: Spinning in a circle; going round and round.

Chinese definition: 傷口的痛處，好像有人用力拉一樣。
English Definition: A throbbing pain at a wound, as if being pulled.

Chinese definition: 用力跪下（賠罪）。
English Definition: Kneeling down firmly (to beg forgiveness or apology).

Chinese definition: （薄荷等食物）讓舌頭清涼的味道。
English Definition: A cool, minty sensation on the tongue (from mint etc.).

Chinese definition: 捲起來。
English Definition: Rolling up; curling.

Chinese definition: 因為寒冷或驚怕而發抖。
English Definition: Shivering or trembling (from cold or fear).

Chinese definition: 剛好反過來。客家話流行有《笠翻歌》。
English Definition: Flipping over exactly; turning right upside down. The Hakka 《笠翻歌》 (Flip-Over Song) is well known.

Chinese definition: 叫聲很難聽。
English Definition: Making an unpleasant, harsh sound when calling out.

Chinese definition: 搖搖欲墜。
English Definition: Shaking unsteadily; on the verge of falling; wobbling.

Chinese definition: 螺旋。
English Definition: Spiraling; in a spiral/helix.

Chinese definition: 不知就裏、不知所措的窘態。
English Definition: At a loss; bewildered; not knowing what to do.

Chinese definition: 發抖得很厲害，比極極震嚴重。
English Definition: Shaking violently (more severe than 極極震).

Chinese definition: 跳來跳去。
English Definition: Jumping and leaping around; bouncing.
